_authoring_notes: Phase 4b RE Pros Section 1 — Navy hero band. REVISED 2026-04-28 PM per Jonathan's redesign mockup, then re-revised same day to align with FSI Elementor convention.
Replaces the prior centered-text floating header (which Jonathan flagged as reading like a section header + leaving 600px of dead space).
Navy hero claims the page immediately. Eyebrow → H1 → one-line value prop. NO CTA in hero (community pages are not conversion pages — conversion happens at tier blocks below).
**Anchor nav REMOVED** per Jonathan's correction — was not in his locked direction.

**Font conventions REVERTED to FSI Elementor convention**: bare H1 inherits The7 default (Open Sans Condensed all-caps via The7 specificity). Matches LLSS / Velocity / Events Hub. Roboto Slab serif was a drift introduced on Memberships + Communities hubs that should not have continued onto this page.

Eyebrow + tagline keep their explicit color/size/transform styles since they are

tags (The7 doesn't restyle paragraphs).
